mapping.Aether.properties: WoT properties used as versioned model definitions
mapping.Aether.points: read-only WoT properties and events with edge authority

aether_constraints: an action declaration never authorizes or directly executes physical control
capability invocation uses a governed job and remains subject to edge policy
live point values are edge-authoritative and are not part of the shared model artifact
Desired, Reported, and Applied revision facts remain distinct
JSON-LD processing is not required by the v1 alpha core
